data_feed._comment: Data-feed provenance (the data-feed upgrade). Each role is wired to its provider — PR1 fixed the previously-DEAD knob (config.data_feed was read but never passed to a fetch, so every fetch silently used the IEX/INDICATIVE defaults). equity_bars feeds the gate's RV closes + underlying + the discovery prescreen markers (sip = the official consolidated close). option_gate is the L1 ENTRY-AUTHORIZATION IV/skew — fail-closed (a premium-feed entitlement lapse VETOES + pages, never downgrades); FLIPPED indicative->opra 2026-06-10 per PREREG_DATA_FEED_OPRA_SEQUENCING (the frozen cheapness arbiter reads the REAL chain; the 'across-session dual-read first' standard was a NAMED relaxation — the dual-read now runs CONCURRENT: INDICATIVE = the shadow arm in gate_dualread/migration 0014, both-arms coverage guard, pinned tripwires, and the date-gated veto-dualread-disagree below). option_monitor is the L2 mark path, pinned FREE/indicative (risk monitoring degrades-and-continues, never blinded). A role change is a record-segmenting data-provenance event (stamped per-run via runs.data_feed, migration 0013). dualread_disagree_veto_until: the §5 disagree-veto's dated AUTO-LAPSE (the INDICATIVE shadow never keeps indefinite veto over the gate-of-record; renewal = a dated edit). dualread_revert_enabled (#72, Phase 3): the MASTER flag for the §5 runtime REVERT latch — DEFAULT false ⇒ the dual-read executor still computes the per-class verdict and PAGES (Phases 1-2 active on the live loop) but NEVER auto-reverts option_gate. When true AND the |Δ iv/rv| wire trips (the SOLE revert trigger — structural-absence/entitlement/transient NEVER revert), the executor writes the OPRA_REVERTED sentinel forcing option_gate→indicative next cycle (operator un-latches by removing the file). ARMED 2026-06-24 (§5 freeze + OPRA deploy-gates cleared + the clean observe-L1 #285 met the precondition + operator sign-off rides this merge); the Δ-wire (the SOLE trigger) has been quiet across the soak (0 breaches / 8 sessions) ⇒ this is inert until a real |Δ iv/rv| breach. Set back to false to dis-arm; remove the OPRA_REVERTED sentinel to un-latch a fired revert. Allowed: equity_bars iex|sip; option_* indicative|opra (an unknown value fails CLOSED at config load).

universe._comment: Reusable price/ADV filter (universe.py) + the T3 discovery SCAN BASKETS (config.universe.themes). Baskets are the curated, version-controlled home of the second-order/VC reasoning (operator authors them, optionally LLM-assisted OUTSIDE the loop): an 'ai_compute' basket carries not just the obvious name but the under-narrated power/grid/copper/cooling/uranium derivatives ('copper-not-rockets'). Discovery scans these for a MOTION/STRUCTURAL trigger; the IV gate decides which are CHEAP now (PREREG §4). The paper loop itself is hand-seeded via themes.json and does NOT read this map.

themes._comment_window1: 2026-06-10 — PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 window #1, the refresh rule's FIRST mechanical run (sources ∩ feasibility screen ∩ achieved-OTM 15–35%; see universe_register.json windows.1 + records/). Four baskets added, 17 names; NNE = operator-named-tagged AND NLR-constituent-verified. Additions-only (Rule 2: source-departure never removes).
themes._comment_window2: 2026-06-22 — PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 window #2 (OFF-CYCLE; §10 off-cycle deploy-warrant met — cap-fittable ∩ council-confirmed under_narrated, the parallel-research silver/freight survivors). Sources SIL/SLVP/BOAT constituents ∩ feasibility ∩ achieved-OTM 15–35%; STNG/SBLK BAND-EXCLUDED (illiquid far-OTM wings: STNG near-ATM 9.2%, SBLK ITM-only −5.7%, like window #1's LTBR/IE). The names read under_narrated=True where the AI-power/nuclear cluster read False (the gen_rescore/survivor council re-scores); at_inflection is the remaining market-dependent leg. See universe_register.json windows.2. Additions-only.
themes._comment_window3: 2026-06-29/30 — PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 off-cycle curation (operator-named industrial-quiet themes; OPRA feasibility-screened cap-fittable). Honest n=1 SINGLETONS — deliberately NOT padded with a correlated 2nd name (§5.1; a manufactured n=2 is worse than an honest n=1). Each is its own cluster, per-name-capped (a singleton needs no clusters.py cluster-cap wiring; that fires only at a 2nd name). Admitted to the SCAN (council + IV gate dispose); explicitly NOT a cheapness-watch clock-starter — the §2.1.7 clock gates on council-CONFIRMED under_narrated, not feasibility-fresh membership (the wrong-race fix). See universe_register.json + records/2026-06-29_*. Additions-only.

eligibility._comment: Live option-tradability floor (universe.check_eligibility mode='live'). The convexity loop also runs options_tradability.py for the per-contract bid/ask + OI gate (PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §3).

convexity_book._comment: Frozen risk frame — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §5. Operator decisions 2026-05-31; per-cluster cap added by the 2026-06-03 amendment. account_equity is a paper nominal until a broker supplies it. cluster_fraction caps aggregate ENTRY-premium per correlation cluster (a name in <=1 cluster; keyed on a deterministic symbol->cluster map, NEVER a theme/basket label — a label can be LLM-set). 0.02 = 2 full names = 20% of book; graduate to 0.03 only once >=4 clusters are curated (dated re-amendment).

clusters._comment: Correlation-budget partition (PREREG §5 amendment 2026-06-03; curated via the trailing-return correlation diagnostic 2026-06-04), documented BY DRIVER so future names route correctly. ai_capex_power = the AI-datacenter power-demand bet (CEG nuclear-gen + NEE utility + CCJ uranium; FCX dropped — copper datacenter-exposure is a sliver of its demand). RE-EXAMINED 2026-06-04: CCJ-NEE pairwise corr is only 0.045, but that is SPOKE-vs-SPOKE — membership is each name's link to the DRIVER, not whether two spokes co-move; uranium-fuel + utility-delivery + electrical-equipment are different supply-side spokes of ONE AI-power-demand bet (nuclear is a MORE direct AI-power spoke than copper ever was; NEE carries a large UNREGULATED renewables/development arm, not a pure regulated utility); cluster mean 0.40 >> 0.26 universe median = cohesive -> KEPT both. Trim a spoke on tail/catalyst evidence (the FCX pattern), never on a single daily-correlation print. space_defense = defense/space-budget driver; EXTENDED 2026-06-04 with the defense primes LMT/NOC/LHX/RTX (the scan basket already held them, the cluster did not — the diagnostic surfaced them at 0.50-0.68 SHARED-driver, resid~=raw so NOT market beta; KTOS bridged to LHX at 0.52). RKLB is the loosest member (0.38-0.45, still > the 0.26 median; national-security launch shares the driver) — KEPT (conservative over-cluster + tail co-dependence on a defense/geopolitical catalyst), the future-split-on-evidence candidate. RE-PARTITIONED 2026-06-10 (window #1, PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 Rule 4 — operator-authorized by the PR merge; book EMPTY so the occupancy recompute = $0, no open position disturbed): (1) NEW nuclear_fuel cluster = the global nuclear-fuel/reactor-cycle driver (demand base = the world reactor fleet + SMR pipeline, broader than AI datacenters) — CCJ MIGRATES there from ai_capex_power for driver coherence (uranium names must share ONE budget; splitting uranium across two clusters would be the false-diversification this cap exists to stop). (2) ai_capex_power gains the window-1 grid names ATKR/AMSC/FLNC — the same electrical-equipment-for-AI-power spoke class as VRT/ETN/PWR (conservative over-cluster). (3) NEW copper_supply cluster = the copper-price driver; FCX (unclustered since 2026-06-03) JOINS with HBM/ERO/TGB — a tightening. (4) the RKLB split-on-evidence FIRES: NEW space_smallcap cluster = the launch/constellation-economics driver (RKLB MIGRATES, + PL/LUNR/RDW/FLY/IRDM); space_defense keeps the budget-driver names KTOS/LMT/NOC/LHX/RTX. Five clusters × $2,000 = the full $10,000 book = the §10 ≥5-independent-groups geometry. The correlation diagnostic remains the backstop; cluster_fraction UNCHANGED at 0.02 (graduation to 0.03 stays its own dated re-amendment). WINDOW #2 (2026-06-22, off-cycle): +silver_deficit (PAAS/HL/CDE/AG — the silver-miner correlation cluster) +seaborne_freight (FRO; STNG/SBLK band-excluded) = SEVEN clusters available; the $10k book still fills AT MOST 5 ($10k/$2k), so the cap geometry is unchanged — more independent groups than the book can fill = more selectivity, never more exposure. cluster_fraction stays 0.02.

convexity_gate._comment: Frozen IV/cheap-convexity gate — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §4. No historical IV exists (forward-only chains) → cheapness is measured vs the underlying's trailing realized vol (from bars) + the live skew shape. Thresholds changed only by documented operator edit, never to justify a trade.

convexity_exits._comment: Frozen L2 exit rules — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §6a. Deterministic, no LLM (the fast reflex, SPEC §3). profit_take_multiple: close when the mark reaches N× the entry premium. time_stop_dte: close when ≤ N calendar days to expiry (avoid the gamma/theta endgame). Otherwise hold to expiry (venture style → most expire worthless = −premium). profit_take_multiple RAISED 4.0→10.0 on 2026-06-01 (operator-authorized, calibration-cited — see PREREG §6a): 4× clipped the convex tail (p99 ~4.5× vs ~10× uncapped) at ~0 cost to the mean.

kill_rule._comment: Frozen — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §6. Halts NEW entries (not force-close) on either condition. The KILL file/env switch is always-on, separately, every cycle.

council._comment: T2 — the LLM theme-judgment council (SPEC §5, PREREG §2 hard seam). The council only PROPOSES themes; the deterministic gates below still DISPOSE. Conviction is recorded + forward-scored ONLY — it NEVER sizes a position and NEVER overrides a veto. The three roles run across DISTINCT providers for decorrelated debate. Provider SDKs are lazy-imported; `orchestrator.py --demo` (and all tests) use a deterministic FakeRouter needing no keys. enabled=false falls back to the T1 hand-seeded loop (themes.json consumed directly). cost_cap_usd is a GENEROUS PROVISIONAL fail-closed cap while per-cycle cost is being measured — the real ceiling + run cadence are an operator decision AFTER seeing the printed per-cycle ledger. MODEL IDs + prices_per_mtok ($ per million tokens) verified against provider docs 2026-06-01 (Balanced tier); models/prices move fast — re-verify periodically (a stale model id fails closed: SDK error → RouterError → 0 entries). prices_per_mtok keys not currently mapped are kept so the ledger stays accurate if a role is remapped.

discovery._comment: T3 sentinel inflection discovery (weekly L0). DISCOVERS candidates → the council JUDGES → the deterministic gates DISPOSE (hard seam unchanged). The prescreen is a MOTION/STRUCTURAL funnel — it makes NO cheapness/alpha claim (cheapness is the IV gate's job, fresh + authoritative); inflection_score is a FUNNEL ranking, never a tradeable signal (PREREG §2). markers.* are the disjunctive absolute floors (surface iff |momentum|≥mom_floor OR rv_slope≥rv_slope_floor OR a structural event) + the within-basket rank knobs — funnel knobs, NOT a frozen gate. max_scan_names bounds the cold-cache data pass (C1); scan_top_k bounds the LLM framer (PR2). sentinel_max_slots reserves book/slots for hand-seed convictions so auto-traded discoveries can't starve them (load-bearing). framer model is DECORRELATED from the council roles (else the council just ratifies it). cost_cap_usd is a GENEROUS PROVISIONAL fail-closed cap — the real ceiling is an operator decision after seeing the printed per-scan ledger (T2 precedent).

events._comment: The structural-filing surface leg (PREREG_EVENT_LEG, frozen 2026-06-10) — the disjunctive gate's quiet-compatible door, a REACHABILITY trigger with NO alpha claim (the FSSD 424B5 grave). forms = the pinned BASE set, matched by EXACT MEMBERSHIP form ∈ {base, base+'/A'} (never a prefix — S-11/S-1MEF/S-3MEF/S-3D/S-3DPOS and S-3ASR [WKSI routine, deliberately excluded] must not match; the foreign mirror excludes F-3ASR/F-3MEF/F-10EF/F-10POS; 424B1/B2/B3/B4 excluded). Domestic raises = 424B5/S-1/S-3; the Canadian MJDS/FPI mirror (HBM/ERO/TGB/NXE file these — smoke-verified 2026-06-10) = F-1/F-3/F-10/SUPPL; ownership = BOTH 13D literals (the 13D/G modernization renamed the form mid-record: legacy 'SC 13D' + current 'SCHEDULE 13D', both observed in-universe). lookback_days = a CLOSED [as_of-14d, as_of] window (~two weekly scans). Funnel knobs, dated-edit-only; the form-set hash is stamped into runs.note per scan.

fixed_basket._comment: The no-gate / fixed-basket NULL books (PREREG_FIXED_BASKET_NULL.md) — test the IV GATE itself (the existing real/shadow pair only tests the council). PR2a ships book 3A ('union_nogate'): gate-OFF over the SAME candidate union the shadow book sees, cap-ON, every L1, so shadow−3A is the FSSD null≈signal control on the edge. PR2b adds 3B (whole basket, equal-weight, weekly) + the shares null. Simulated-only, NEVER the broker, fail-soft (a null bug never halts the real cycle). enabled=false disables the no-gate books; the real loop is unaffected.

shares_basket._comment: The SHARES descriptive null (PREREG_FIXED_BASKET_NULL §2/§5, PR2c) — convexity vs LINEAR. An append-only entry log over the option-eligible basket names (weekly L0, motion-derived direction, equal-weight = one unit); signed returns are computed at REPORT time from bars at the horizon set below, with the §6 terminal-event survivorship guard. DESCRIPTIVE only — shown ALONGSIDE the option tails, NEVER scored against them; forward, never a pass-gate. Simulated, NEVER the broker, fail-soft. horizons mirror the calibration tenor sweep (the convex book holds ~250d median, not 180d).

cluster_diagnostic._comment: Report-not-gate cluster-cap curation BACKSTOP (PREREG §5). Trailing-return correlation over the names the system trades/considers; flags co-moving pairs NOT co-clustered so the operator can curate convexity_book.clusters. It NEVER edits the map (hard seam) and NEVER gates a trade. Tuned for SENSITIVITY (a false negative under-protects the cap): union flag max(raw,resid,spearman), top_n SORTED not hard-filtered (the threshold highlights, never drops a near-miss), Pearson treated as a LOWER BOUND on the tail co-dependence a convex book concentrates. window_days matched to the ~250d convex hold (the cap's horizon); residual strips residual_benchmark beta = the shared-driver attribution, NOT the gatekeeper (residual β is noisy on the free feed); min_overlap is the reporting floor — below it a name is invisible, covered instead by the cap's conservative over-cluster default. All PINNED (§7). Read-only over the warm cache (client=None ⇒ no fetch); fail-soft in L0.

basket_quality._comment: Report-not-gate basket-curation diagnostic (IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md:171; PREREG_FIXED_BASKET_NULL 74-79). Closes the survivorship -> basket-curation loop: per curated scan basket (config.universe.themes), ties what it PRODUCED (surfaced sentinels, framer verdicts, traded outcomes, forward returns) back to the roster so the operator can curate the basket BY HAND (hard seam — it never edits universe.themes, never gates a trade, writes no DB row, no migration). It is the sibling that makes 3B-absolute's curation contamination auditable (heavy drift -> discount 3B-absolute; real-3B stays clean). Cache-only (NO-FETCH, client=None), fail-soft in L0. FORWARD READ is SPLIT by horizon semantics: reference_forward is horizon-indexed (stock returns, surfaced-never-traded + controls, §6 terminal guard reused per horizon — the §6-correct multi-horizon read, NOT the stored 180d); traded_outcomes is pooled (option realized-multiple resolves once at the ~250d exit). horizons mirror the calibration/shares tenor sweep. MATURITY-GATED (load-bearing for the null hierarchy: 3B runs over the live basket, so outcome-conditioned pruning on a thin record would make the contamination adaptive): outcome/never-productive flags need window_age >= max(horizon) AND the per-metric min thresholds; default is KEEP; only data-dead + degenerate-basket flags are evidence-independent. basket != cluster — the correlation diagnostic curates convexity_book.clusters, this curates universe.themes. PINNED (never tuned to a gap).

execution._comment: Real Alpaca paper order path (broker.AlpacaPaperBroker). SENDING is gated by safety.dry_run: dry_run=true (default) logs the intended order + simulates the fill — nothing is transmitted; dry_run=false actually submits to the PAPER endpoint. cancel_unfilled: at reconcile, cancel a still-resting limit (it re-evaluates next cycle) instead of leaving it open.
